description_long: This tram features a rectangular, elongated body with a predominantly yellow exterior accented by black window panels and detailing. The roof is flat and segmented with dark panels, possibly representing solar panels or ventilation grilles. Along each side, there are several evenly spaced, rectangular windows with black frames, interspersed with small circular lights or indicators beneath them. The front of the tram is slightly tapered, with a central circular headlight and a set of grille-like details below, giving it a modern, streamlined appearance. The corners of the tram are angular, and the overall design suggests a robust, urban public transport vehicle. The tram lacks visible pantographs or overhead electrical connectors, and there are no clear door outlines or external signage.
description: A modern, yellow tram with black windows, a flat segmented roof, and a streamlined front featuring a central headlight and grille details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tapered nose, central circular headlight, and grille details below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a row of rectangular black-framed windows, small circular lights beneath, and the tram's elongated, boxy shape.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with a central circular feature and grille details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the window and light arrangement of the other side.
attribute_door_configuration: uncertain, no visible doors on either side
attribute_window_arrangement: Eight large, evenly spaced rectangular windows per side, separated by narrow yellow panels, forming a regular pattern
